Uganda National Roads Authority

Bridge Traffic & Network Analytics

Focused bridge crossing dashboard showing host road links, nearby traffic count stations, classified ADT, and wider-network loading context.

Operational Loading & Network Influence Context

The traffic loading on each bridge crossing is interpreted through its host road link, nearby traffic count stations, classified vehicle mix, and surrounding corridor connectivity. Non-bridge asset sections have been removed so the dashboard stays focused on bridges and the traffic affecting them.

Interactive Spatial Network Map
Single map with Esri World Imagery + reference labels when online, and an embedded offline vector fallback when tiles are unavailable. The 2026 national road network, bridge host roads, bridges, and traffic count stations are drawn from embedded local data.
ROAD CLASS LEGEND
Class A - International Trunk Roads
Class B - National Trunk Roads
Class C - Primary Roads
Class M - Expressways

Complete 2026 bridge inventory from Bridges and Culverts 2026.xlsx. Includes host road link structural attributes and available traffic loading context. Click on any row to open the Bridge Detail Modal.

Bridge Crossing Traffic Influence Method

Each bridge crossing is interpreted using its host road, nearby manual count stations, and nearby automatic traffic counters. Automatic station classification profiles assign the bridge ADT into motorcycle, light vehicle, bus, heavy goods, and detailed vehicle-class volumes, while manual stations define wider-network count coverage around the crossing.

Bridge Crossings by Traffic Loading Band
Filtered bridges grouped by estimated daily link AADT
Heavy Vehicle Exposure by Nearest ATC Station
Nearest counter context mapped to bridge crossings in the active filter set
Grouped ADT Evidence by Bridge
Top bridge crossings comparing host-link ADT, automatic-counter ADT, and final assigned bridge ADT
Grouped Vehicle-Class ADT by Bridge
Assigned bridge ADT split into major vehicle classes using affected automatic count stations
Stacked Vehicle-Class Loading by Bridge
Major vehicle-class daily volumes for the highest assigned-ADT bridge crossings in the active filter set
Per-Bridge Traffic Analytics & Wider Network Context
Bridge-by-bridge traffic loading estimate from nearby manual and automatic count stations, assigned class volumes, speed context, and network influence screening priority.
Bridge Link ID Corridor Region Class Link AADT Nearest Manual Count Manual Distance Nearest ATC ATC Distance ADT Incl. MC ADT Excl. MC Motorcycle ADT Light ADT Bus ADT Heavy Goods ADT Evidence Monthly Heavy Avg Speed Influence Score Priority

Traffic Count Station Coverage

Combines the 298 manual traffic count stations, 15 legacy ATC corridors, and current automatic counter stations so bridge loading can be interpreted through a wider network evidence base rather than a single host road link.

Grouped Station Coverage by Source
Manual count, legacy ATC and current ATC station/corridor records
Stacked Manual Count Stations by Region
Manual count station inventory grouped by maintenance region
Clustered Count Station Coverage by Region
Manual count stations, geocoded manual stations, and current ATC stations compared by region
Clustered Count Stations by Road Class
Manual station coverage compared across national road classes M, A, B, and C
Manual Count Station Inventory
All 298 manual count station locations, linked road sections, stations, and regions.
TCS No. Station Name Link ID Link Name Station Region Latitude Longitude
Legacy ATC Corridor Summary
15 historical ATC station/corridor sheets summarized from 2016-2022 records.
Legacy ID Corridor Observations Average ADT Max ADT Dominant Classified Category
Classified Traffic Counts - Automatic Counter Stations
18-bin vehicle classification counts and ADT splits from automatic traffic counts. Includes ADT with motorcycles, ADT excluding motorcycles, and per-vehicle-class ADT estimates allocated from station AADT.
ADT by Vehicle Class
Estimated average daily traffic by vehicle class for the selected ATC station. ADT is apportioned from station AADT using observed classified-count shares.
Vehicle Class Count Share % Estimated ADT Included in ADT excl. motorcycles
ATC Deployed Station Inventory & Performance Summary
AADT counts, light vs heavy vehicle classification ratios, and vehicle speed records

Stacked Vehicle Classification by Current ATC Station
18-class automatic counter vehicle classification totals grouped into major vehicle families
Legacy ATC Classified Composition
Historical 2016-2022 corridor classifications summarized by legacy ATC station
Clustered ATC ADT Splits by Station
ADT including motorcycles, excluding motorcycles, motorcycle ADT, and bus/heavy-goods ADT by current ATC station
Clustered Legacy ATC Class Totals
Historical corridor class totals shown as side-by-side columns instead of stacked bars

Active works packages plus 27 ongoing/candidate bridge works records from the bridge construction candidate list. Source: Department of National Roads status report and local bridge works inventory.
